sections.title: When a piece of acceptable food is used on them

lines.speaker: Dalcian Fang (easy)
lines.text: Ah, so you want to give me some supplies, eh? Let me just open me backpack.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there. What are you doing here?

lines.speaker: Dalcian Fang (easy)
lines.text: I'm waiting here hoping that someone can guide me to the Paterdomus, the temple on the Salve.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Where is Paterdomus?

lines.speaker: Dalcian Fang (easy)
lines.text: Oh, Paterdomus is that rather impressive looking temple on the Salve... I'm sure you must have passed it on your way into Morytania.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why do you want to go to Paterdomus?

lines.speaker: Dalcian Fang (easy)
lines.text: I'm hoping to get back to civilisation and see what the lands of Misthalin look like.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Could you defend yourself if we met enemies on the route to Paterdomus?

lines.speaker: Dalcian Fang (easy)
lines.text: Let's just say that I'm somewhat experienced and I'm happy to take on my fair share of bad guys. You don't need to worry about that.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I can take you to Paterdomus.

lines.speaker: Dalcian Fang (easy)
lines.text: Hmmm, it seems that you have a follower. I think it may get lost on this journey if it's left to wander on its own. Let's leave when your follower is safe.

lines.speaker: Dalcian Fang (easy)
lines.text: Oh really? That would be great! I'll give you a small reward once we reach our destination.

lines.speaker: Dalcian Fang (easy)
lines.text: Ok, which route should we take?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ok, thanks.

lines.speaker: Dalcian Fang (easy)
lines.text: Oh, I hate this trip, but it's better than staying in Burgh de Rott.

lines.speaker: Dalcian Fang (easy)
lines.text: It's scary here...let's get going!

lines.speaker: Dalcian Fang (easy)
lines.text: When are we going to get to Paterdomus?

lines.speaker: Dalcian Fang (easy)
lines.text: We don't have all day to stand around chatting; let's press on.

lines.speaker: Dalcian Fang (easy)
lines.text: Do you visit Paterdomus often? You seem to know the route well.

sections.title: If the player or Dalcian is in combat

lines.speaker: Dalcian Fang (easy)
lines.text: Can't you see I'm being attacked...?

sections.title: When a piece of acceptable food is used on them and they are not full health

lines.speaker: Dalcian Fang (easy)
lines.text: Thanks, I'll get this down my neck.

lines.speaker: Dalcian Fang (easy)
lines.text: Blimey! Looks like we're going to have to go back to Burgh de Rott. We can't get over that bridge!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, I'm sure we can find a way!

lines.speaker: Dalcian Fang (easy)
lines.text: Well that's torn it... Looks like we can't get over this bog. We'll have to go back to Burgh de Rott.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, I'm sure we can find a way!

lines.speaker: Dalcian Fang (easy)
lines.text: Hey...that's great...you did a great job...I'll follow you.

lines.speaker: Dalcian Fang (easy)
lines.text: Whahay...that was great!

lines.speaker: Dalcian Fang (easy)
lines.text: But we really should be heading off now.

lines.speaker: Dalcian Fang (easy)
lines.text: Well that's torn it... Looks like we can't get over this bog. We'll have to go back to Burgh de Rott.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, I'm sure we can find a way through!

lines.speaker: Dalcian Fang (easy)
lines.text: That's amazing! I'll have to do the same.

lines.speaker: Dalcian Fang (easy)
lines.text: Whahay! That was great! But we really should be heading off now.

lines.speaker: Dalcian Fang (easy)
lines.text: Wh...what are those bubbles?

lines.speaker: Dalcian Fang (easy)
lines.text: This is scary!

lines.speaker: Dalcian Fang (easy)
lines.text: Ahhh, that would be a tentacle...

lines.speaker: Dalcian Fang (easy)
lines.text: Ahhh, two tentacles!

lines.speaker: Dalcian Fang (easy)
lines.text: ...three tentacles!

lines.speaker: Dalcian Fang (easy)
lines.text: I think I'm going to faint!

lines.speaker: Dalcian Fang (easy)
lines.text: Blimey! Look at that beast! You're gonna have to sort that thing out on your own!

lines.speaker: Dalcian Fang (easy)
lines.text: Many thanks for getting me safely to the temple. Here's your reward.
